evals.prompt: Create a new Kubernetes namespace 'dev-team' and deploy a 3-worker TKC cluster running K8s 1.28
expectations: Uses create_namespace with cluster_id and storage_policy
Shows dry_run preview before actual creation

evals.prompt: Scale the production TKC cluster to 5 workers and get me the kubeconfig
expectations: Returns kubeconfig content or file path

evals.prompt: Is our vSphere cluster ready for Tanzu? Check compatibility and list available K8s versions
evals.expected_output: Compatibility check results and version list
expectations: Clearly reports whether VKS is supported
